markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather Abnormal's feedback on GrowthX's service and platform.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Gap:** GrowthX's content misses its traffic target (5k vs. 15-20k/mo), driven by a low-impact glossary strategy. High-performance editorial content (300% growth) shows the model's potential.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Strategic Opportunity:** Abnormal wants to replace its \~$1.5M/yr content syndication spend with organic leads. GrowthX's LLM visibility gains (18% → 30% share) are a key asset for this goal.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**Platform Access:** Abnormal is interested in a platform license to build an in-house solution. GrowthX's plan to open-source its engine in December could be a fit for Abnormal's technical CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Renewal Risk:** Abnormal's March renewal is at risk. GrowthX must deliver a clear, data-backed 2026 plan to justify its cost as Abnormal's largest single vendor expense.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Strategy Mismatch

  - [Abnormal is satisfied overall but notes a performance gap between GrowthX's content strategy and business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**Traffic Miss:** Content generated 5k new visitors/mo, missing the 15-20k/mo target.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Over-investment in a low-impact glossary strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [**Bright Spot:** Editorial content is growing at 300% and driving clicks, proving the model's effectiveness when focused on the right content.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [**Goal:** Drive more high-quality website traffic, not just lead volume.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)

### Strategic Opportunity: Replacing Content Syndication

  - [Abnormal's primary strategic goal is to replace its \~$1.5M/yr content syndication spend with organic leads.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [**Syndication Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Cost:** \~$1.5M/yr.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
      - [**Volume:** \~9,000 leads/quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
      - [**Quality:** Sales reps dislike the leads; attribution is unreliable.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [**Organic Lead Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [Website demo requests (the highest-quality lead) have seen record growth (2x in Q2, +30% in Q3), which Abnormal attributes partly to GrowthX's traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
      - [**LLM Visibility:** Share of voice in AI answers grew from 18% to 30% in one month, exceeding the 25% quarterly goal. This high-quality, low-volume channel is a key asset.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Build lead capture on the website (e.g., newsletters) to replace syndication volume with higher-quality, lower-cost organic leads.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Platform Access & In-House Build

  - [Abnormal is interested in a platform license to build an in-house solution, especially given its CEO's focus on AI.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [**Alternative:** Build a solution using tools like AirOps, requiring 1-2 new hires.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Plan:** Open-source its engine in December.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Target User:** Engineers, not marketers.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This could be a good fit for Abnormal's technical CEO, who is pushing for more internal AI development.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [Schedule a QBR/planning session for early December to create a data-backed 2026 roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
      - [Develop a plan to help Abnormal replace its content syndication spend with organic leads.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
      - [Package the LLM visibility gains (18% → 30% share) as a key value driver for Abnormal's CEO.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [**Abdallah:**](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
      - [Analyze attribution data to quantify the impact of organic search and LLM referrals on demo requests.](https://fathom.video/share/w9shXjKSvhVn6Thcbsuj55JrT1ocepKV?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
